data.title: Graph Substrate and Operations
data.notes: PerspectiveGraph, operations module, 9 passing tests. restore() method added to PerspectiveGraph for clean revert encapsulation.
data.description: Implement directed graph structure with binary edge typing (structural / operational). Implement the Graph Operation Interface: match, apply, revert, complexity, lookup, register. Unit test each operation group on hand-constructed graphs. No layer structure yet — flat graphs only.
data.exit_condition: All five operation groups work correctly on hand-constructed test graphs.
